features.evidence: I haven't owned my own since giving my wife my m1 air almost 5 years ago to buy a windows gaming laptop The software-Mac Os is pretty nice
The Build:-Build quality feels solid I'm an Instructional Designer/ Corporate Trainer and needed a serious laptop to do some serious computing

I can type pretty quickly on it, and overall provides decent tactile feedback for a small / thin laptop-Screen is beautiful Should you buy a Macbook Air instead?-If you can get a macbook pro for <= 200 dollars more, get it, because of the screen and speakers alone
value: display: ['Liquid Retina XDR display', '14.2-inch (diagonal) Liquid Retina XDR display;2 3024-by-1964 native resolution at 254 pixels per inch', 'XDR (Extreme Dynamic Range)', '1,000,000:1 contrast ratio', 'XDR brightness: 1000 nits sustained full-screen, 1600 nits peak3 (HDR content only)', 'SDR brightness: up to 1000 nits (outdoor)', 'Color', 'Support for 1 billion colors', 'Wide color (P3)', 'True Tone technology', 'Refresh rates', 'ProMotion technology for adaptive refresh rates up to 120Hz']

display support: ['Simultaneously supports full native resolution on the built-in display at 1 billion colors and:', 'Up to two external displays with up to 6K resolution at 60Hz over Thunderbolt, or one external display with up to 6K resolution at 60Hz over Thunderbolt and one external display with up to 4K resolution at 144Hz over HDMI', 'One external display supported at 8K resolution at 60Hz or one external display at 4K resolution at 240Hz over HDMI']

features.evidence: I gave my gaming laptop (Alienware 15 inch, 32 Gig of RAM, and two Samsung SSD with 1 TB each) to my wife With 24gb my RAM pressure stays low and keeps things fast

-I've only felt it warm one time when i was installing 80GB of Logic Pro sounds and downloading some other stuff at the same time, with browser open with 10 tabs, etc Screen resolution is phenomenal and the speakers are excellent

Also keep in mind, the Air starts at 256GB vs 512GB for the pro, so when do your price comparisons, use that as the baseline (512GB AIR) Price-Mac RAM prices used to seem unreasonable, until this whole RAM shortage thing happened
-Keyboard feels nice The keyboard was smooth and responsive
value: keyboard and trackpad: ['Backlit Magic Keyboard with:', '78 (U.S.) or 79 (ISO) keys including 12 full‑height function keys and 4 arrow keys in an inverted‑T arrangement', 'Touch ID', 'Ambient light sensor', 'Force Touch trackpad for precise cursor control and pressure‑sensing capabilities; enables Force clicks, accelerators, pressure‑sensitive drawing, and Multi‑Touch gestures']

features.evidence: Blacks are inky black, HDR is fantastic ) They did fantastic job with the aluminum body of this laptop that feels really good in your hands
Performance-we already know Apple silicon performs very well
